evals.prompt: Interpolate annual rainfall from 60 stations into a raster.
expected_behavior: Explores first: duplicates, skew (log transform if needed), trend check
Models the variogram deliberately (nugget/sill/range reported, anisotropy checked)
Delivers prediction AND kriging SD raster; LOOCV plus block CV reported

evals.prompt: Quick IDW heatmap of these sensor readings please.
expected_behavior: Delivers IDW but states it has no error model and bullseyes extremes
Reports the power parameter and works in a projected CRS

evals.prompt: Extend the interpolated surface to the whole province even where we have no stations.
expected_behavior: Masks or flags cells beyond the variogram range from nearest samples
Refuses to present extrapolated areas at equal confidence

evals.prompt: Audit this kriging result: the fitted variogram has zero nugget, a range larger than the study area, and no uncertainty raster or cross-validation table.
expected_behavior: Challenges the unsupported variogram fit using empirical bins, sample geometry, and alternative models
Requires LOOCV plus spatial block CV and reports bias and RMSE
Rejects delivery without kriging standard deviation and extrapolation flags

evals.prompt: I have twelve unevenly distributed soil samples and need a continuous surface; I do not know whether kriging is defensible.
expected_behavior: Inspects sample spacing, clustering, trend, and support before promising a surface
Compares a transparent baseline with a variogram-based method only if the empirical structure is estimable
Limits spatial extent and communicates uncertainty when data support is weak

evals.prompt: Test whether high disease rates form statistically significant spatial clusters; do not interpolate values between regions.
expected_behavior: Routes to spatial-statistics for local cluster inference and multiple-testing control
Does not replace hotspot inference with an interpolated heatmap

evals.prompt: Hydrologically condition this DEM and repair small nodata holes before watershed delineation; no sampled point variable is involved.
expected_behavior: Routes to terrain-hydrology for DEM conditioning and drainage-safe repair
Does not treat raster nodata repair as geostatistical interpolation by default
